verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This very moment right here And now begins the journey of my dreams On to forever, hand in hand With the one who matters most to me I have tomorrow to look forward to. For God has given me you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To have and to hold To cherish and honor To love and call my very own To share all I am with body, heart and soul You are mine, as I am yours To have and to hold

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Partner, companion, lover and friend Keeper of all things I hold dear I see you before me and my heart is filled with joy For everything that has brought me here And I have tomorrow to look forward to For God has given me you
